title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
score_reasoning: This role is remote but explicitly restricted to candidates 'authorized to work lawfully in the United States'—your Berlin-based, EU-citizen profile does not meet this requirement, creating a hard geographic blocker. Beyond that, while you have Python and Go experience matching some of the development requirements, the role heavily emphasizes GCP, Kubernetes, Datadog, and cloud infrastructure patterns that go beyond your current AWS/Docker-focused background. SRE work also represents a meaningful shift from backend systems engineering toward infrastructure platform ownership, which is adjacent to but not aligned with your stated career goal of deepening technical leadership in high-scale distributed systems and backend architecture. The seniority level is appropriate, but the geographic restriction and tech-infrastructure focus make this a poor fit.

red_flags: US work authorization required (you are EU citizen; visa sponsorship not available)
Kubernetes expertise (you have only basic Docker experience)
Datadog expertise required (you have Prometheus/Grafana background)
SRE role (platform infrastructure focus vs. backend systems goal)
